title: Software Update - DFU is not available during a call
scenario: DFU is blocked with pop-up message when attempting to update firmware during an active call on Device Settings Software Update page
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Make or receive an active call using the connected device.
4. While on the active call, navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
7. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
expected: A pop-up appears with the message "Cannot update this device during a call". Tapping OK dismisses the pop-up and returns the user to the Software Update tab without starting the DFU.
